# Wellbore Storage

**Summary**: The accumulation of fluid in the wellbore during production.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013]] accounted for wellbore storage and skin effects in the analytical models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013]] Affects early-time pressure data interpretation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013]] Modeled as a constant C term.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Wellbore storage is identifiable by a unit slope line on pressure derivative plots. ([[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013, p. 74]])
